import { ChangeDetectorRef, Component, Inject } from '@angular/core'; import { HttpClient } from '@angular/common/http'; import { Customer } from '../../models/customer'; import { CustomerService } from '../../services/customer.service'; @Component({ selector: 'customer', templateUrl: './customer.component.html' }) export class CustomerComponent { public customers: Customer[] = []; constructor( http: HttpClient, @Inject('BASE_URL') baseUrl: string, customerService: CustomerService, private changeDetectorRef: ChangeDetectorRef ) { const customersEndPoint = baseUrl + 'api/customer/all'; console.log("End point :" + customersEndPoint); /* http.get(customersEndPoint).subscribe( result => { this.customers = result; console.log("results :" + this.customers.length); }, error => console.error(error));*/ customerService.getAll() .subscribe((data) => { this.customers = data; console.log('list...items:' + this.customers.length); this.changeDetectorRef.detectChanges(); }); } }
